status_vocabulary.pass: The frozen legacy case is required to satisfy the case oracle.
status_vocabulary.known-fail: The case must reproduce the pinned failure_class; an unexpected pass is rejected.
status_vocabulary.blocked: The product command must reproduce the pinned non-executable failure_class.
status_vocabulary.discovery-required: Only --discover may run this case. Discovery never emits the canonical PASS line and cannot enter a formal scenario report.

resolution_policy.coverage: Every generated case in all six primary model/backend lanes must resolve to exactly one most-specific rule.
resolution_policy.formal_rule: Canonical collection rejects a lane while any resolved case is discovery-required.
resolution_policy.amendment_rule: A discovery observation must be reviewed in an independent commit that replaces discovery-required with pass, known-fail, or blocked before formal collection is rerun.
resolution_policy.mismatch_rule: Unexpected fail, unexpected pass, failure-class drift, missing coverage, or ambiguous equal-specificity rules are hard failures.

blocked_lane_policy.rule: Blocked is allowed for the two frozen Qwen3.5 Metal architecture gaps and for the reviewed M3 Metal 32 GiB unified-memory capacity blocker. CUDA lanes remain executable; blocked cannot substitute for product execution.

rules.evidence_basis: Frozen cff4 M1 CUDA discovery report sha256:97782c70a14ce622a50643ad652a4b3466fbebbec7bb5334c1636e9e0e54b932, independently validated by sha256:3ea76962b94f69412585bc47826f8028dda89ed892cc87f4c31ddb038bbde99e, observed 20 matching cases.
rules.next_action: Reproduce this frozen failure in G00 and make the final contract pass in G08A.
